title: The Quiet Room
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A woman wakes in a soundproof room with no memory of how she got there — and her captor insists she volunteered.
long_description: The room is white. The room is silent. The room has no door. Dr. Anna Keller, a memory researcher specializing in sensory deprivation, wakes in a chamber that matches her own experimental design. Her captor speaks through a speaker she cannot locate and claims she signed a consent form. Her memories are gaps. Her certainties are crumbling. The Quiet Room is a taut, claustrophobic thriller about the stories we tell ourselves to survive the unbearable — and what happens when the silence begins to answer back.
